_comment: Synthetic example - a general-purpose AI model (GPAI, Chapter V) provider. Showcases the GPAI obligations and the OWASP GenAI Data Security lens (DSGAI).
sys_description: A general-purpose large language model trained on a broad web corpus and offered to downstream developers through a hosted API.
intended_purpose: Provide a general-purpose text-generation model for downstream applications to build on.
human_oversight: Downstream deployers integrate the model and remain responsible for its use in context.
